summary: Backend testing for Stripe webhook fix and coach auth. All 6 tests pass after fixing: (1) missing COACH_EMAIL global variable in server.py, (2) incorrect HMAC signature construction in test (was stripping whsec_ prefix, stripe uses full secret string as UTF-8 key).

critical.issue: COACH_EMAIL global variable was never defined in server.py — only COACH_PASSWORD was defined at line 1310. Fixed by adding COACH_EMAIL = os.environ.get('COACH_EMAIL', 'vince@launchpathedu.com') alongside COACH_PASSWORD.

action_items: COACH_EMAIL variable was missing from server.py — fixed in this iteration (added at line 1310 alongside COACH_PASSWORD). Verify no other undefined variable references exist.
critical_code_review_comments: COACH_EMAIL was referenced in ~10 places throughout server.py but never defined as a module-level variable. COACH_PASSWORD was defined but COACH_EMAIL was not. This caused 500 errors on /api/auth/login for coach logins.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested backend tests pass: health check, both webhook routes registered (400 not 404), valid Stripe HMAC signature returns 200 and processes checkout.session.completed, coach login returns 200, admin module-content endpoint returns 200. Key fix: COACH_EMAIL global was missing from server.py.
